mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_skill (id, name, summary, content, tags, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_skill WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'deleted'

SELECT * FROM agent_skill WHERE status != 'deleted' AND id IN
#{id}
SELECT * FROM agent_skill WHERE status != 'deleted' ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_skill WHERE status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_skill SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_skill WHERE id = #{id}
